name: Plum Wonderful Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb chicken dark meat, no skin, R-T-C
1 1/2 lb chicken breast halves without skin
recipeInstructions:
1. In a nonstick skillet, brown the chicken over medium heat for about 10 minutes.
2. Remove chicken and place it in a 3-quart baking dish.
3. Drain all but 1 tablespoon of fat from the skillet.
4. Add onion, garlic, and gingerroot to the skillet. Cook until the onion is tender.
5. Stir together the remaining ingredients and mix them into the onion mixture.
6. Heat the sauce just to boiling.
7. Reduce heat and let simmer, covered, for 5 minutes.
8. Spoon the sauce over the chicken in the dish.
9. Bake, uncovered, at 350°F for 40 to 45 minutes or until the chicken is done, spooning sauce over the chicken occasionally.
